Metadata.siteName: Jesus Film Project · World Cup 2026 Activate
Metadata.defaultDescription: Jesus Film Project Activate — share World Cup 2026 videos in the language that matches your audience.
Metadata.socialAlt: World Cup 2026 Activate by Jesus Film Project
Metadata.ogTagline: Every match, every nation, every soul.
Metadata.resourcesDescription: The complete outreach toolkit for the World Cup 2026 — ready-to-use journeys, customizable videos, and physical kits.

Home.tagline: Every match, every nation, every soul.
Home.title: Activate Your Region
Home.description: Jesus Film Project has created a simple way to share the Gospel with your friends and family during the World Cup.
Home.regionSubheading: Seven regions. Pick the one you're activating.

africa.name: Africa
africa.blurb: Across Africa's activation region. Hundreds of languages. One game.
africa.seoDescription: World Cup 2026 outreach tools for Africa: share videos in local languages and track country-level views.

east-asia.name: East Asia
east-asia.blurb: China, Japan, Korea, Mongolia — the heart of the Pacific rim.
east-asia.seoDescription: Activate East Asia for World Cup 2026 with regional Jesus Film Project videos, QR codes, share links, and view tracking.

europe.name: Europe
europe.blurb: The continent where the modern game was written.
europe.seoDescription: Activate Europe during World Cup 2026 with Jesus Film Project videos, QR codes, share links, and regional view data.

lac.name: Latin America & Caribbean
lac.blurb: From Tijuana to Tierra del Fuego — a continent unified by football.
lac.seoDescription: World Cup 2026 outreach tools for Latin America & Caribbean: share regional videos, QR codes, and local-language journeys.

namestan.name: North Africa, Middle East & Central Asia
namestan.blurb: Morocco to Kazakhstan — across three continents.
namestan.seoDescription: Activate North Africa, the Middle East & Central Asia with World Cup 2026 videos, QR codes, and local-language sharing tools.

nao.name: North America & Oceania
nao.blurb: United States, Canada, Australia, New Zealand & the Pacific.
nao.seoDescription: World Cup 2026 outreach tools for North America & Oceania: share local-language videos, QR codes, and regional view data.

sesa.name: Southeast & South Asia
sesa.blurb: From Mumbai to Manila — home to a quarter of the world's people.
sesa.seoDescription: World Cup 2026 outreach tools for Southeast & South Asia: share local-language videos across a high-reach region.

Region.tagline: Every match, every nation, every soul.
Region.title: Share the Gospel during the World Cup
Region.description: The World Cup brings billions of people together — it's the perfect moment to share what matters most. Use this tool to send a personalized Gospel message in someone's heart language, in just a few steps.

Steps.chooseBody: Find videos in your audience's local language — 30+ options.
Steps.shareBody: Share the QR code or link anywhere — SMS, social, print, in person.
Steps.trackBody: Watch views and shares as the story spreads across your region.

CountryViews.heading: Where The Story is Spreading
CountryViews.viewsUnavailableBody: Country view data could not be loaded right now.
CountryViews.noViewsBody: No country-level views are available for {regionName} yet.

SharePanel.noJourneys: No journeys yet for this region.
SharePanel.stepOne: Pick a language your friend, family member, or neighbor understands.
SharePanel.stepTwo: Watch what they'll experience {direction} before you send it.
SharePanel.stepThree: Share this link below with them.
SharePanel.stepFour: Download a QR code if you want one for print or in-person sharing.
SharePanel.mapPrompt: Want to see how people around the world are responding to faith this season? Explore the map below.
SharePanel.shareText: Watch and share this World Cup 2026 story in {language}.
SharePanel.journeyBody: This is an interactive Gospel journey that bridges between football and faith in Jesus. We've provided videos and text translated into your heart language, with an opportunity to follow up.
SharePanel.mapBody: Visit the map below to see how people are engaging with faith this World Cup season.

HomeLaunchVideo.heading: See the heart of the activation.

HomeLaunchEvent.heading: Walk through the toolkit together.
HomeLaunchEvent.body: One hour. The whole vision. Hear how Jesus Film Project, partners, and ministry leaders worldwide are activating the moment — and leave with the launch plan for your region.
HomeLaunchEvent.freeCaption: Free. Confirmation and join link sent by Zoom after you register.
HomeLaunchEvent.calendarTitle: Activate the Global Soccer Moment, June 2026 Outreach Opportunities
HomeLaunchEvent.calendarDescription:
Join the global conversation on Zoom through a growing movement of believers equipped to open their homes, activate their churches, and bring their communities together through simple, digital outreach during a global cultural moment. Using these resources, you can turn a shared moment into a meaningful connection.

Jesus Film Project offers these global free resources to help you step into the world's most-watched sporting event with intention, hospitality, and faith.

Learn more about this at https://football2026.nextstep.is/
HomeLaunchEvent.shareCopyText:
You're invited: Activate the Global Soccer Moment — June 2026 Outreach Opportunities.

When: Monday, June 1, 2026 · 9:00 AM ET (60 minutes)
Where: Zoom

Register: {registrationUrl}
Meeting ID: {meetingId}

Jesus Film Project is offering global free resources to help you step into the world's most-watched sporting event with intention, hospitality, and faith.
Learn more: https://football2026.nextstep.is/

Resources.tagline: Every match, every nation, every soul.
Resources.title: Resources for the moment.
Resources.description: Everything is free and built for the 39 days of the World Cup. Take what fits your team and run with it.

readyToUse.heading: Ready-to-Use
readyToUse.body: Copy, share, done. No editing required — text these to seekers and new believers today.

customizable.heading: Customizable
customizable.body: Templates, dubbing kits, and source files. Adapt them to your language, your audience, your moment.

physicalKits.heading: Physical Kits
physicalKits.body: Tangible tools for watch parties, sports evangelism, and ministry teams on the ground.

prayforawin.title: PrayForAWin.com
prayforawin.blurb: A simple link to share a Gospel presentation with a live-chat mentor option built in.

when-everything.title: When Everything is On the Line
when-everything.blurb: A soccer-themed digital journey for people exploring their instinct to pray in moments of fear or uncertainty.

where-you-belong.title: Where You Belong
where-you-belong.blurb: Mobile-friendly follow-up with a one-minute video on personal value to Jesus — available in 76 languages.

i-belong-jesus.title: I Belong to Jesus
i-belong-jesus.blurb: A six-day YouVersion devotional by Kaká on finding identity in Christ.

kingdom-playmaker.title: Kingdom Playmaker: Living With Intention
kingdom-playmaker.blurb: A five-day YouVersion plan by Eyong Enoh on discovering your God-given identity.

fully-his.title: Fully His: The Power of Daily Surrender
fully-his.blurb: A six-day YouVersion plan by Jonathan Mensah on surrendering every area of life to God.

tools-transformation.title: Tools for Transformation
tools-transformation.blurb: A five-day YouVersion plan by Lucas Moura on spiritual habits and character.

nextsteps-templates.title: NextSteps Journey Templates
nextsteps-templates.blurb: Build sports-themed digital journeys with images, videos, quizzes, Bible verses, and prayer prompts.

hope-ball-not-enough.title: When You Feel Like You're Not Enough
hope-ball-not-enough.blurb: A dubbing kit on the emotional journey of pursuing a goal — and the impact of failure.

hope-ball-joy-gone.title: When the Joy is Gone
hope-ball-joy-gone.blurb: A dubbing kit that contrasts the fleeting joy of winning with the lasting victory Jesus won on the cross.

praying-hands-prayer.title: Praying Hands
praying-hands-prayer.blurb: A one-minute dubbing kit on how we all instinctively pray in moments of fear or uncertainty.

praying-hands-talk-jesus.title: You Can Talk to Jesus
praying-hands-talk-jesus.blurb: A sports-themed dubbing kit with a voiceover Gospel presentation.

ultimate-coach.title: The Ultimate Coach
ultimate-coach.blurb: A one-minute Gospel presentation using sports, coaching, and game plans as the entry point.

most-asked-questions.title: The Most Asked Questions Online
most-asked-questions.blurb: A sports-themed dubbing kit on our deepest curiosity — leading to questions about Jesus.

after-the-win.title: After the Win
after-the-win.blurb: A reflective dubbing kit to set up conversations after the game — perfect for follow-up.

print-collection.title: Print & other resources
print-collection.blurb: Printable materials, invitations, and miscellaneous assets to help you share videos and the Gospel.

all-videos.title: All videos — Global Football collection
all-videos.blurb: The full collection of sports-themed films you can use to spark Gospel conversations.

watch-party-kit.title: Watch Party Kit
watch-party-kit.blurb: Host guides, bracket, recipes, and a soccer ball — everything you need for a home or church gathering.

movement-maker-kit.title: Movement Maker Kit
movement-maker-kit.blurb: Two soccer balls, 100 wristbands, Bibles, and a kit manual — built for global ministry teams.

jesus-loves-you-ball.title: Jesus Loves You Ball
jesus-loves-you-ball.blurb: A sports evangelism tool with four symbols designed for cultural sensitivity in any context.
